name: Royal Punishment — Government Asset Seizure
description: Sun afflicted by Saturn/Rahu in relevant houses indicates asset seizure by government or institutional authority.

source_text.quote: If the Sun be afflicted by Saturn or Rahu in houses of wealth, the native suffers seizure of assets by royal authority (government).

all_of: Sun is afflicted by Saturn or Rahu (conjunction or aspect)

interpretation.meaning: Government or institutional authority seizes assets. Tax raids, penalties, legal confiscation of property. The crisis comes from above, not from market forces.

metadata.notes: Modern interpretation: tax raids, IT notices, regulatory penalties, bank account freezing.

name: Royal Scion Sudden Bankruptcy — High Status Collapse
description: Strong natal wealth indicators combined with 8th lord activation creates sudden bankruptcy from a position of prosperity.

source_text.quote: Even a native born in royal family, if the 8th lord is powerful and afflicts the 2nd/11th, shall suddenly lose all wealth and become bankrupt.

all_of: 8th lord is strong (exalted, own sign, or in kendra)

interpretation.meaning: Sudden, dramatic fall from prosperity. The crisis is catastrophic and rapid — bankruptcy filing, business collapse, or total asset wipeout from a seemingly stable position.

metadata.notes: The 'rags from riches' pattern. Most dangerous because the native is complacent before the crisis.

name: 5th/9th Lords in Dusthana — Speculative Collapse
description: Lords of speculation (5th) and fortune (9th) in evil houses create pattern of spectacular speculative failure.

source_text.quote: When lords of 5th and 9th occupy Dusthanas, the native's speculative ventures collapse spectacularly, bringing massive debt from leveraged positions.

all_of: Lord of 5th house is in 6th, 8th, or 12th house
Lord of 9th house is in 6th, 8th, or 12th house

interpretation.meaning: Speculative collapse — stock market losses, failed business ventures, cryptocurrency crashes. The native's speculative intelligence is compromised and luck deserts them at critical moments.

metadata.notes: Outcome quality: classifies the crisis as speculative in nature. Important for counseling — the native must avoid all forms of speculation.

name: Jupiter in 12th from Arudha Lagna — Tax Burden Outcome
description: Jupiter in 12th from Arudha Lagna classifies financial crisis as primarily tax/regulatory burden driven.

source_text.quote: Jupiter in the 12th from Arudha Lagna indicates expenditure through taxes, religious obligations, and mandatory payments to authorities.

all_of: Jupiter is in the 12th house from Arudha Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Financial drain is primarily through taxes, regulatory compliance costs, and institutional obligations. Not a market-driven crisis but a structural overhead crisis.

metadata.notes: Jupiter in 12th from AL is charitable/religious expense in traditional texts. Modern interpretation includes tax obligations.

name: Mercury in 12th from Arudha Lagna — Disputes & Litigation Drain
description: Mercury in 12th from Arudha Lagna classifies financial crisis as driven by disputes, litigation, and contractual failures.

source_text.quote: Mercury in the 12th from Arudha Lagna indicates expenditure through litigation, disputes, broken contracts, and communication failures.

all_of: Mercury is in the 12th house from Arudha Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Financial crisis driven by legal disputes, broken contracts, and communication breakdowns. Lawyer fees, settlement costs, and contractual penalties drain wealth.

metadata.notes: Mercury=commerce, contracts, communication. In 12th from Arudha these become sources of financial drain.

name: Moon-Mars in 8th — Hidden Liability Outcome
description: Moon-Mars combination in 8th house classifies crisis as hidden liability emergence — debts or obligations the native didn't know existed.

source_text.quote: Chandra-Mangala yoga in the 8th house transforms wealth-generating combination into hidden liability. The native discovers debts, guarantees, or obligations previously unknown.

all_of: Moon and Mars are in the same sign (conjunct)
Moon-Mars conjunction is in the 8th house

interpretation.meaning: Hidden financial liabilities surface — inherited debts, co-signer obligations triggered, undisclosed company liabilities. The crisis comes from below/behind, not from visible sources.

metadata.notes: Chandra-Mangala in 8th reverses the normally positive wealth yoga into a hidden debt revealer.

name: 11th from 6th Lord Active — Chronic Loan Dependency
description: Activation of 11th house from 6th lord position classifies crisis as chronic loan dependency — the native lives on borrowed money.

source_text.quote: When the 11th from the 6th lord is activated, gains come only through borrowing. The native becomes perpetually dependent on loans for survival.

all_of: 6th lord is strong (in kendra, own sign, or exalted)
any_of: Benefic planet in 11th from 6th lord position
11th house from 6th lord is aspected by Jupiter

interpretation.meaning: Chronic debt dependency — the native cannot function without borrowed money. EMIs, credit cards, personal loans become the primary income source. A debt spiral.

metadata.notes: Modern relevance: credit card debt cycles, EMI traps, personal loan spirals.

name: Saturn in 2nd Hostile Sign — Financial Dysfunction
description: Saturn in 2nd house in an enemy or debilitated sign creates systematic financial dysfunction — earnings are blocked or immediately consumed.

source_text.quote: Saturn in the 2nd house in hostile dignity creates a pattern where wealth is systematically denied or immediately consumed by obligations. The native earns but cannot save.

all_of: Saturn is placed in the 2nd house
any_of: Saturn is in enemy sign (Sun's or Moon's signs)

interpretation.meaning: Saturn restricts and delays the 2nd house matters (savings, family wealth, speech). In hostile dignity this becomes active financial dysfunction — every earning is immediately consumed.

metadata.notes: Saturn in 2nd is generally challenging for wealth. In hostile dignity the effect is magnified to active dysfunction.

name: Sun in 6th — Bad Loans & Bribery Losses
description: Sun in 6th house classifies financial crisis as driven by bad loans given to others and losses through corruption/bribery.

source_text.quote: Sun in the 6th creates a pattern where the native loses money through bad loans to others, bribes to officials, and authoritarian exploitation.

all_of: Sun is placed in the 6th house

interpretation.meaning: Financial losses through lending money that's never returned, paying bribes/facilitation fees, and being exploited by authority figures. The native's generosity or naivety is weaponized against them.

metadata.notes: Sun in 6th — authority + enemies house. Creates losses through misplaced trust in authority figures and lending.

name: Weak 10th + 3rd/9th Afflicted — Reduced to Begging
description: Extremely weak 10th house combined with afflicted 3rd and 9th indicates complete financial collapse to the point of begging.

source_text.quote: If the 10th lord is weak and the 3rd and 9th are afflicted by malefics without benefic support, the native is reduced to begging and complete dependence on others.

all_of: 10th lord is weak (debilitated, combust, or in 6th/8th/12th)
any_of: 3rd house or 3rd lord is afflicted by malefics without benefic aspect
9th house or 9th lord is afflicted by malefics without benefic aspect

interpretation.meaning: The most extreme outcome classification. Complete loss of livelihood (10th), self-effort capacity (3rd), and fortune (9th). The native becomes entirely dependent on others for survival.

metadata.notes: Most severe poverty outcome in BPHS. Indicates need for immediate social safety net activation.
